requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No EU-Style Horizontal RoHS Regime in Peru
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——秘鲁无欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——秘魯無歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Peru does NOT operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime restricting specific hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates) in electrical and electronic equipment as a precondition to market placement. There is no Peruvian counterpart to EU Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) / (EU) 2015/863 that mandates maximum concentration values in homogeneous materials for LED luminaires. Substance controls in Peru are addressed through general chemical, environmental, and health frameworks (e.g., controls on specific substances such as mercury under environmental/health law, and import controls for restricted chemicals) rather than a dedicated EEE substance-restriction directive. Exporters should still note: (1) destination markets or buyers may contractually require RoHS-type compliance even where Peruvian law does not; (2) any luminaire containing mercury (e.g., legacy fluorescent components) may face separate environmental controls; (3) IEC 62321-type substance testing is not a Peruvian market-access requirement for LED luminaires as of 2026 — verify current law.
summary.zh: 秘鲁并不实施欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，不将限制电气电子设备中特定有害物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯）作为市场投放的前提。没有相当于欧盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）/（EU）2015/863、对 LED 灯具均质材料强制规定最大浓度值的秘鲁制度。秘鲁的物质管控通过一般化学品、环境及健康框架处理（如依环境/健康法对汞等特定物质的管控，以及对受限化学品的进口管制），而非专门的 EEE 物质限制指令。出口商仍应注意：（1）目的市场或买家即便在秘鲁法律未要求时也可能在合同中要求 RoHS 式合规；（2）任何含汞灯具（如传统荧光元件）可能面临单独环境管控；（3）截至 2026 年，IEC 62321 式物质检测不是秘鲁对 LED 灯具的市场准入要求——请核验现行法律。
summary.zht: 秘魯並不實施歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，不將限制電氣電子設備中特定有害物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯）作為市場投放的前提。沒有相當於歐盟指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）/（EU）2015/863、對 LED 燈具均質材料強制規定最大濃度值的秘魯制度。秘魯的物質管控通過一般化學品、環境及健康框架處理（如依環境/健康法對汞等特定物質的管控，以及對受限化學品的進口管制），而非專門的 EEE 物質限制指令。出口商仍應注意：（1）目的市場或買家即便在秘魯法律未要求時也可能在合同中要求 RoHS 式合規；（2）任何含汞燈具（如傳統熒光元件）可能面臨單獨環境管控；（3）截至 2026 年，IEC 62321 式物質檢測不是秘魯對 LED 燈具的市場准入要求——請核驗現行法律。

standards_or_laws: No Peruvian horizontal RoHS directive equivalent to EU 2011/65/EU / (EU) 2015/863 as of 2026 (verify current law)
General Peruvian chemical/environmental/health controls (substance-specific, e.g., mercury) administered by the relevant authorities

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572 (Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same thresholds as EU RoHS, together with China RoHS 2 (Management Measures, SJ/T 11364 marking) requiring a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange/green) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS 2 is primarily a disclosure-labelling regime rather than a market ban; as of 2026 the 4 EU phthalates are not yet in the CN mandatory restricted list. China therefore has a defined substance-disclosure framework that Peru lacks for EEE.
summary.zh: 中国对应制度为 GB/T 26572（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；并配合中国 RoHS 2（管理办法，SJ/T 11364 标识），要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附有害物质披露标识（橙色/绿色）。中国 RoHS 2 主要为披露标识制度而非市场禁入；截至 2026 年，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯尚未纳入中国强制限制清单。因此中国对 EEE 设有秘鲁所缺的物质披露框架。
summary.zht: 中國對應制度為 GB/T 26572（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；並配合中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法，SJ/T 11364 標識），要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附有害物質披露標識（橙色/綠色）。中國 RoHS 2 主要為披露標識制度而非市場禁入；截至 2026 年，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯尚未納入中國強制限制清單。因此中國對 EEE 設有秘魯所缺的物質披露框架。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: This is a case where Peru is LESS demanding than both the EU and China on substance restriction: Peru has no horizontal RoHS/EEE substance-restriction or disclosure-label requirement for LED luminaires (verify current law), whereas China requires a China RoHS 2 disclosure label and GB/T 26572 limits on 6 substances. Practical implications for a Chinese exporter to Peru: (1) the Chinese RoHS disclosure label is not a Peruvian requirement, and the EU's 4-phthalate testing burden does not arise from Peruvian law; (2) however, the exporter should not assume zero obligation — buyers, retailers, or international supply-chain contracts may still demand RoHS-type compliance, and any mercury-containing components may trigger separate Peruvian environmental controls; (3) if the same product line is also exported to the EU, the EU RoHS 10-substance (including 4 phthalates) testing still applies for the EU shipments. The honest summary: Peru imposes no RoHS-equivalent EEE substance regime, so this is a reduced obligation versus the EU, not an additional one.
gap.zh: 这是秘鲁在物质限制方面较欧盟与中国均更宽松的情形：秘鲁对 LED 灯具没有横向 RoHS/EEE 物质限制或披露标识要求（请核验现行法律），而中国要求中国 RoHS 2 披露标识及 GB/T 26572 对 6 项物质的限值。对中国出口商出口秘鲁的实际影响：（1）中国 RoHS 披露标识不是秘鲁要求，且欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯检测负担并不来自秘鲁法律；（2）但出口商不应假定毫无义务——买家、零售商或国际供应链合同仍可能要求 RoHS 式合规，且任何含汞元件可能触发单独的秘鲁环境管控；（3）若同一产品线同时出口欧盟，则欧盟 RoHS 10 项物质（含 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）检测对欧盟货物仍适用。诚实总结：秘鲁未施加 RoHS 等效的 EEE 物质制度，故相较欧盟为减少的义务而非额外义务。
gap.zht: 這是秘魯在物質限制方面較歐盟與中國均更寬鬆的情形：秘魯對 LED 燈具沒有橫向 RoHS/EEE 物質限制或披露標識要求（請核驗現行法律），而中國要求中國 RoHS 2 披露標識及 GB/T 26572 對 6 項物質的限值。對中國出口商出口秘魯的實際影響：（1）中國 RoHS 披露標識不是秘魯要求，且歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測負擔並不來自秘魯法律；（2）但出口商不應假定毫無義務——買家、零售商或國際供應鏈合同仍可能要求 RoHS 式合規，且任何含汞元件可能觸發單獨的秘魯環境管控；（3）若同一產品線同時出口歐盟，則歐盟 RoHS 10 項物質（含 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）檢測對歐盟貨物仍適用。誠實總結：秘魯未施加 RoHS 等效的 EEE 物質制度，故相較歐盟為減少的義務而非額外義務。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Peru has no EU-style horizontal RoHS / EEE substance-restriction or disclosure-label requirement for LED luminaires as of 2026 (substance-specific environmental controls may apply, e.g., mercury); verify current law
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances; 4 phthalates not yet in CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: INDECOPI / PRODUCE — Gobierno del Peru (technical regulations and conformity)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime for LED luminaires — there is no Peruvian maximum-concentration substance restriction or disclosure-label requirement equivalent to EU RoHS or China RoHS 2 (verify current law). This is a reduced obligation versus the EU, not an additional one. Chinese exporters should still account for buyer/contractual RoHS expectations and any substance-specific Peruvian environmental controls (e.g., mercury), and retain EU RoHS 10-substance testing for any parallel EU shipments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁对 LED 灯具没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度——没有相当于欧盟 RoHS 或中国 RoHS 2 的秘鲁最大浓度物质限制或披露标识要求（请核验现行法律）。这相较欧盟为减少的义务而非额外义务。中国出口商仍应考虑买家/合同的 RoHS 期望及任何特定物质的秘鲁环境管控（如汞），并为任何并行欧盟货物保留欧盟 RoHS 10 项物质检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯對 LED 燈具沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度——沒有相當於歐盟 RoHS 或中國 RoHS 2 的秘魯最大濃度物質限制或披露標識要求（請核驗現行法律）。這相較歐盟為減少的義務而非額外義務。中國出口商仍應考慮買家/合同的 RoHS 期望及任何特定物質的秘魯環境管控（如汞），並為任何並行歐盟貨物保留歐盟 RoHS 10 項物質檢測。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical Supply-Chain Notification — No REACH-Style SVHC Duty in Peru
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品供应链通报——秘鲁无 REACH 式 SVHC 义务
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品供應鏈通報——秘魯無 REACH 式 SVHC 義務

summary.en: Peru does NOT impose a REACH-style Substances of Very High Concern (SVHC) supply-chain notification obligation on articles. There is no Peruvian equivalent of EU REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 (the duty to communicate SVHC presence above 0.1% w/w to business customers and consumers), no ECHA-style biannually updated Candidate List enforced in Peru, and no SCIP-style database notification for articles. Peru regulates chemicals through general frameworks — substance-specific import controls, hazardous-chemical classification/labelling for chemicals as such (GHS-aligned), and environmental/health authorities — but these do not create an article-level SVHC communication duty for finished LED luminaires. As a result, a Chinese LED luminaire exporter to Peru does not face the ongoing biannual SVHC screening and 45-day notification burden that EU placement triggers (verify current law, as chemical regulation evolves).
summary.zh: 秘鲁并不对物品施加 REACH 式高度关注物质（SVHC）供应链通报义务。没有相当于欧盟 REACH 法规（EC）1907/2006 第 33 条（须向商业客户及消费者通报 SVHC 含量超过 0.1% 质量分数的义务）的秘鲁制度，没有在秘鲁执行的 ECHA 式每半年更新候选清单，也没有针对物品的 SCIP 式数据库通报。秘鲁通过一般框架管理化学品——特定物质进口管制、对化学品本身的危险化学品分类/标签（与 GHS 一致），以及环境/健康主管机构——但这些并未对成品 LED 灯具产生物品层面的 SVHC 通报义务。因此，向秘鲁出口的中国 LED 灯具出口商不面临欧盟投放所触发的每半年 SVHC 筛查及 45 天通报负担（请核验现行法律，因化学品法规在演变）。
summary.zht: 秘魯並不對物品施加 REACH 式高度關注物質（SVHC）供應鏈通報義務。沒有相當於歐盟 REACH 法規（EC）1907/2006 第 33 條（須向商業客戶及消費者通報 SVHC 含量超過 0.1% 質量分數的義務）的秘魯制度，沒有在秘魯執行的 ECHA 式每半年更新候選清單，也沒有針對物品的 SCIP 式數據庫通報。秘魯通過一般框架管理化學品——特定物質進口管制、對化學品本身的危險化學品分類/標籤（與 GHS 一致），以及環境/健康主管機構——但這些並未對成品 LED 燈具產生物品層面的 SVHC 通報義務。因此，向秘魯出口的中國 LED 燈具出口商不面臨歐盟投放所觸發的每半年 SVHC 篩查及 45 天通報負擔（請核驗現行法律，因化學品法規在演變）。

standards_or_laws: No Peruvian equivalent to EU REACH (EC) 1907/2006 Article 33 SVHC article-notification duty as of 2026 (verify current law)
General Peruvian chemical management / GHS-aligned classification and labelling for chemicals as such (not an article-level SVHC duty)

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent to the REACH SVHC Article 33 article-notification duty. The closest Chinese instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) on new-substance registration and GB 30981 (classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous chemicals labelling — neither creates a proactive B2B/consumer SVHC notification obligation for articles. In this respect China and Peru are similar: neither imposes the EU's ongoing article-level SVHC communication duty on finished luminaires.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH SVHC 第 33 条物品通报义务的制度。最接近的中国制度为生态环境部令第 12 号（新化学物质环境管理登记办法）关于新物质登记，及 GB 30981（化学品分类和标签）用于危险化学品标签——二者均未对物品产生主动的 B2B/消费者 SVHC 通报义务。在这一点上中国与秘鲁相似：二者均未对成品灯具施加欧盟式持续的物品层面 SVHC 通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH SVHC 第 33 條物品通報義務的制度。最接近的中國制度為生態環境部令第 12 號（新化學物質環境管理登記辦法）關於新物質登記，及 GB 30981（化學品分類和標籤）用於危險化學品標籤——二者均未對物品產生主動的 B2B/消費者 SVHC 通報義務。在這一點上中國與秘魯相似：二者均未對成品燈具施加歐盟式持續的物品層面 SVHC 通報義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Here Peru and China are aligned in NOT having an EU-style SVHC article-notification duty — so this is an area where exporting to Peru imposes no extra ongoing chemical-communication burden beyond what the Chinese exporter already lives with (which is itself minimal at the article level). Practical points: (1) there is no Peruvian biannual Candidate List screening, no 45-day customer-notification clock, and no SCIP-style article database — none of these EU obligations carry over to Peru; (2) the exporter should still observe substance-specific Peruvian import/environmental controls and any GHS labelling for chemical substances as such (e.g., if shipping chemicals, not finished luminaires); (3) if the same product is also placed on the EU market, REACH Article 33 and SCIP obligations apply for the EU side and must be maintained separately. The honest position: Peru does not replicate REACH — this is a reduced obligation versus the EU.
gap.zh: 此处秘鲁与中国一致，均不设欧盟式 SVHC 物品通报义务——故出口秘鲁在化学品通报方面不会带来超出中国出口商既有负担（其本身在物品层面已极少）的额外持续负担。实际要点：（1）秘鲁没有每半年候选清单筛查、没有 45 天客户通报时限、没有 SCIP 式物品数据库——这些欧盟义务均不延及秘鲁；（2）出口商仍应遵守特定物质的秘鲁进口/环境管控及对化学品本身的 GHS 标签（如运输化学品而非成品灯具时）；（3）若同一产品同时投放欧盟市场，则 REACH 第 33 条及 SCIP 义务对欧盟侧适用并须单独维持。诚实立场：秘鲁未复制 REACH——相较欧盟为减少的义务。
gap.zht: 此處秘魯與中國一致，均不設歐盟式 SVHC 物品通報義務——故出口秘魯在化學品通報方面不會帶來超出中國出口商既有負擔（其本身在物品層面已極少）的額外持續負擔。實際要點：（1）秘魯沒有每半年候選清單篩查、沒有 45 天客戶通報時限、沒有 SCIP 式物品數據庫——這些歐盟義務均不延及秘魯；（2）出口商仍應遵守特定物質的秘魯進口/環境管控及對化學品本身的 GHS 標籤（如運輸化學品而非成品燈具時）；（3）若同一產品同時投放歐盟市場，則 REACH 第 33 條及 SCIP 義務對歐盟側適用並須單獨維持。誠實立場：秘魯未複製 REACH——相較歐盟為減少的義務。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Peru has no REACH-style Article 33 SVHC article-notification duty, no enforced Candidate List, and no SCIP-style database as of 2026 (substance-specific chemical controls may apply); verify current law
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — no proactive article-level SVHC supply-chain notification duty equivalent to REACH Article 33 exists in China as of 2026

source.publisher: PRODUCE / INDECOPI — Gobierno del Peru (chemical and technical-regulation framework)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru imposes no REACH-style SVHC article-notification duty on LED luminaires — there is no Article 33 communication obligation, no enforced Candidate List, and no SCIP-style article database (verify current law). China is similarly without such an article-level duty, so exporting to Peru adds no ongoing SVHC communication burden. Substance-specific Peruvian import/environmental controls may still apply, and any parallel EU placement still triggers REACH Article 33 / SCIP separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁对 LED 灯具不施加 REACH 式 SVHC 物品通报义务——没有第 33 条通报义务、没有执行的候选清单、没有 SCIP 式物品数据库（请核验现行法律）。中国同样无此物品层面义务，故出口秘鲁不增加持续的 SVHC 通报负担。特定物质的秘鲁进口/环境管控仍可能适用，且任何并行欧盟投放仍单独触发 REACH 第 33 条/SCIP。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯對 LED 燈具不施加 REACH 式 SVHC 物品通報義務——沒有第 33 條通報義務、沒有執行的候選清單、沒有 SCIP 式物品數據庫（請核驗現行法律）。中國同樣無此物品層面義務，故出口秘魯不增加持續的 SVHC 通報負擔。特定物質的秘魯進口/環境管控仍可能適用，且任何並行歐盟投放仍單獨觸發 REACH 第 33 條/SCIP。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Conformity & Import Process — Peru Technical Regulation + Importer vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体合格评定与进口流程——秘鲁技术规范 + 进口商 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體合格評定與進口流程——秘魯技術規範 + 進口商 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Placing an LED luminaire on the Peruvian market typically involves: (1) determining whether the product category is covered by a Reglamento Tecnico (technical regulation) issued via PRODUCE/INDECOPI — if so, conformity to the referenced NTP/IEC standards is mandatory and verified at import; (2) preparing conformity evidence (test reports to the relevant NTP-IEC standards — safety, and where applicable performance/EMC — ideally via internationally recognised CB-scheme/accredited reports to ease acceptance); (3) MINEM energy-efficiency labelling where the lighting category is in the labelled scope (Spanish-language label at point of sale); (4) MTC homologation for any wireless/smart functionality; (5) acting through an in-country importer (importador) who handles customs and bears local responsibility, with goods cleared at the port of Callao; (6) Spanish-language product information/marking as required by consumer-protection rules (INDECOPI). Peru does not use an EU-style single CE self-declaration; conformity is demonstrated against the applicable NTP/Reglamento Tecnico through the importer.
summary.zh: 将 LED 灯具投放秘鲁市场通常涉及：（1）确定产品类别是否受经 PRODUCE/INDECOPI 发布的技术规范（Reglamento Tecnico）管辖——若是，则符合所引用 NTP/IEC 标准为强制，并在进口环节核验；（2）准备合格评定证据（依相关 NTP-IEC 标准的检测报告——安全，以及在适用时性能/EMC——最好通过国际认可的 CB 体系/经认可报告以便接受）；（3）在照明类别处于标识范围时进行 MINEM 能效标识（销售点西班牙文标识）；（4）对任何无线/智能功能进行 MTC 型号核准；（5）通过当地进口商（importador）办理，由其处理清关并承担本地责任，货物在卡亚俄（Callao）港清关；（6）依消费者保护规则（INDECOPI）提供西班牙文产品信息/标识。秘鲁不采用欧盟式单一 CE 自我声明；合格评定通过进口商对照适用的 NTP/技术规范证明。
summary.zht: 將 LED 燈具投放秘魯市場通常涉及：（1）確定產品類別是否受經 PRODUCE/INDECOPI 發布的技術規範（Reglamento Tecnico）管轄——若是，則符合所引用 NTP/IEC 標準為強制，並在進口環節核驗；（2）準備合格評定證據（依相關 NTP-IEC 標準的檢測報告——安全，以及在適用時性能/EMC——最好通過國際認可的 CB 體系/經認可報告以便接受）；（3）在照明類別處於標識範圍時進行 MINEM 能效標識（銷售點西班牙文標識）；（4）對任何無線/智能功能進行 MTC 型號核准；（5）通過當地進口商（importador）辦理，由其處理清關並承擔本地責任，貨物在卡亞俄（Callao）港清關；（6）依消費者保護規則（INDECOPI）提供西班牙文產品信息/標識。秘魯不採用歐盟式單一 CE 自我聲明；合格評定通過進口商對照適用的 NTP/技術規範證明。

standards_or_laws: Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) — Peruvian technical regulation framework determining mandatory conformity by category
NTP-IEC standards (INACAL) referenced by the applicable technical regulation
MINEM Etiquetado de Eficiencia Energetica (energy label) and MTC homologation (radio) where applicable
INDECOPI consumer-protection labelling rules (Spanish-language product information)

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for in-scope residential luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA, requiring third-party certification by a CNCA-authorized body (e.g., CQC). Voluntary CQC certification is available for products outside mandatory CCC. Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally require SRRC type approval. CCC is a domestic mandatory third-party scheme; Chinese certificates and test reports are issued under the Chinese system and are not recognised as Peruvian conformity evidence — although CB-scheme/IEC reports generated in China can be leveraged to support Peruvian conformity where accepted.
summary.zh: 在中国，面向范围内居民灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授权机构（如 CQC）进行第三方认证。对于非强制 CCC 范畴的产品可申请自愿性 CQC 认证。无线功能灯具还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 为国内强制性第三方方案；中国证书及检测报告系在中国体系下出具，不被认可为秘鲁合格评定证据——但在中国生成的 CB 体系/IEC 报告在被接受时可用于支撑秘鲁合格评定。
summary.zht: 在中國，面向範圍內居民燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，要求由 CNCA 授權機構（如 CQC）進行第三方認證。對於非強制 CCC 範疇的產品可申請自願性 CQC 認證。無線功能燈具還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 為國內強制性第三方方案；中國證書及檢測報告系在中國體系下出具，不被認可為秘魯合格評定證據——但在中國生成的 CB 體系/IEC 報告在被接受時可用於支撐秘魯合格評定。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA/CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: China runs a mandatory third-party CCC scheme administered domestically; Peru's conformity is category-driven (mandatory only where a Reglamento Tecnico applies) and is executed through an in-country importer against NTP/IEC standards. Key gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) CCC certificates and Chinese test reports are not recognised in Peru — internationally recognised CB-scheme/accredited reports against the NTP-IEC standards are the practical route to acceptance; (2) Peru requires a local importer/representative to handle customs (Callao) and local responsibility — there is no Peruvian Authorised-Representative scheme identical to the EU's, but the importer plays the in-country accountable role; (3) Spanish-language product information/marking is required (INDECOPI consumer rules); (4) the obligations split across agencies — INACAL/INDECOPI/PRODUCE (standards & technical regulation), MINEM (energy label), MTC (radio) — rather than a single CE-style declaration; (5) the exporter must first confirm whether the specific LED category is under a current Reglamento Tecnico, since that determines whether conformity is mandatory or reference-only.
gap.zh: 中国实行国内管理的强制性第三方 CCC 方案；秘鲁的合格评定以类别为驱动（仅在技术规范适用时为强制），并通过当地进口商对照 NTP/IEC 标准执行。中国出口商的主要差距：（1）CCC 证书及中国检测报告在秘鲁不被认可——依 NTP-IEC 标准的国际认可 CB 体系/经认可报告是被接受的实际途径；（2）秘鲁要求当地进口商/代表处理清关（Callao）及本地责任——秘鲁没有与欧盟完全相同的授权代表制度，但进口商承担当地问责角色；（3）须提供西班牙文产品信息/标识（INDECOPI 消费者规则）；（4）义务分散于各机构——INACAL/INDECOPI/PRODUCE（标准与技术规范）、MINEM（能效标识）、MTC（无线电）——而非单一 CE 式声明；（5）出口商须先确认具体 LED 类别是否处于现行技术规范之下，因为这决定合格评定为强制还是仅为参考。
gap.zht: 中國實行國內管理的強制性第三方 CCC 方案；秘魯的合格評定以類別為驅動（僅在技術規範適用時為強制），並通過當地進口商對照 NTP/IEC 標準執行。中國出口商的主要差距：（1）CCC 證書及中國檢測報告在秘魯不被認可——依 NTP-IEC 標準的國際認可 CB 體系/經認可報告是被接受的實際途徑；（2）秘魯要求當地進口商/代表處理清關（Callao）及本地責任——秘魯沒有與歐盟完全相同的授權代表制度，但進口商承擔當地問責角色；（3）須提供西班牙文產品信息/標識（INDECOPI 消費者規則）；（4）義務分散於各機構——INACAL/INDECOPI/PRODUCE（標準與技術規範）、MINEM（能效標識）、MTC（無線電）——而非單一 CE 式聲明；（5）出口商須先確認具體 LED 類別是否處於現行技術規範之下，因為這決定合格評定為強制還是僅為參考。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional/process — conformity is mandatory where a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) covers the category, verified at import through an in-country importer (Callao); Spanish-language consumer marking required; MINEM label and MTC homologation apply where relevant
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for in-scope residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

source.publisher: INDECOPI / PRODUCE — Gobierno del Peru (technical regulations and conformity)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Peru's LED conformity is category-driven and executed through an in-country importer against NTP/IEC standards, becoming mandatory where a Reglamento Tecnico (PRODUCE/INDECOPI) applies — unlike China's domestically administered mandatory third-party CCC. Chinese CCC certificates are not recognised in Peru; internationally recognised CB-scheme/accredited NTP-IEC reports are the practical route. Obligations split across INACAL/INDECOPI/PRODUCE, MINEM (energy label), and MTC (radio), with Spanish-language consumer marking and Callao port clearance via the importer. Confirm first whether the specific LED category falls under a current Peruvian technical regulation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁的 LED 合格评定以类别为驱动，通过当地进口商对照 NTP/IEC 标准执行，并在技术规范（PRODUCE/INDECOPI）适用时成为强制——区别于中国国内管理的强制性第三方 CCC。中国 CCC 证书在秘鲁不被认可；国际认可的 CB 体系/经认可 NTP-IEC 报告是实际途径。义务分散于 INACAL/INDECOPI/PRODUCE、MINEM（能效标识）及 MTC（无线电），并需西班牙文消费者标识及经进口商在卡亚俄（Callao）港清关。请先确认具体 LED 类别是否受现行秘鲁技术规范管辖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 秘魯的 LED 合格評定以類別為驅動，通過當地進口商對照 NTP/IEC 標準執行，並在技術規範（PRODUCE/INDECOPI）適用時成為強制——區別於中國國內管理的強制性第三方 CCC。中國 CCC 證書在秘魯不被認可；國際認可的 CB 體系/經認可 NTP-IEC 報告是實際途徑。義務分散於 INACAL/INDECOPI/PRODUCE、MINEM（能效標識）及 MTC（無線電），並需西班牙文消費者標識及經進口商在卡亞俄（Callao）港清關。請先確認具體 LED 類別是否受現行秘魯技術規範管轄。
